expertAssessments.rationale: Production direct and primary stream probes both returned the deterministic monitoring-metric-current answer for Q-NEW76 omitted-noun wording with zero-token usage.
The answer uses current monitoring data and ranks CPU, memory, and disk by critical/warning count, peak usage, and average usage.
GitLab main validate, GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel version endpoint, Cloud Run health, and free-tier usage guardrails all passed for v8.12.73.

usageChecks.summary: v8.12.73 production deploy after check: effective 18.5833 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 16443.
Cloud Run guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300s, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00578-tqc.

notes: Production /api/version returned v8.12.73 with commit 095023c002b5b7b13783eda9f7c61f6d6a36951c and pipeline 2558589906.
Vercel stream/v2 response headers showed x-ai-source=cloud-run and x-backend=cloud-run-stream-v2.
Direct and primary stream responses both used deterministic domain evidence with responsePolicy=deterministic_answer.
The pre-push artifact audit and the first cold Docker preflight timeout were the only process abnormalities observed; both were remediated before release.
The remaining P5 session context issue remains no-fix and was not part of this release.
